evidence_policy: Confirmed extraction-unit divergences are maintainer-ready findings, not upstream CVEs or repository-defect claims until source audit confirms the same pattern in the upstream project.

findings.disclosure_status: maintainer-ready coordinated-disclosure draft generated; send only after auditing the upstream source for the same pattern

maintenance_snapshot.active_evidence: GitHub reported a same-day push and update when this finding was prepared; the repository was not archived.

findings.note: Symbolic signed-overflow witness; real compiler confirmation is optional.
findings.remediation: Accumulate byte counts in an unsigned or widened type, or guard the maximum representable value before translating to wrapping target arithmetic.
findings.upstream_status: upstream-instance source audit pending; this record must not be cited as an upstream uutils/coreutils CVE or confirmed repository defect
